source_anchors.title_authors_venue: ragas_evaluation_source_evidence.md E01 identifies the title, authors, venue, and year.
source_anchors.main_task: ragas_evaluation_source_evidence.md E02 identifies reference-free RAG evaluation and the retrieval/generation framing.
source_anchors.metric_suite: ragas_evaluation_source_evidence.md E03 defines faithfulness, answer relevance, and context relevance.
source_anchors.results_api_limitations: ragas_evaluation_source_evidence.md E04 identifies human-judgment alignment, Python API utility, reproducibility risks, and evaluator-LLM dependence.

title: RAGAS: Automated Evaluation of Retrieval Augmented Generation
main_task: Reference-free automated evaluation of RAG pipelines across retrieval, faithful use of retrieved context, and generated answer quality.
main_metric: Faithfulness, answer relevancy, and context relevancy.
secondary_metrics: agreement with human judgments on WikiEval
one_limitation: RAGAS relies heavily on the LLMs used for evaluation and can be affected by model randomness, API changes, and evaluator-model suitability.
worth_reason: It provides a practical Python API and reference-free metrics that can be integrated into RAG development workflows.
